title: Baby Axolotl Panorama
description: Call me crazy but axolotls are my favorite mob in the game. They're so squishy, so fluffy and so cute. So what's stopping you from having them in your main menu? Well, now nothing does!
body:
# Cute Axolotls In Your Vicinity!
Call me crazy but axolotls are my favorite mob in the game. They're so squishy, so fluffy and so cute. 

So what's stopping you from having them in your main menu? Well, now nothing does! 

![Baby Axolotl Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e024e67be05c56d153a0b64cadd42beb2da679.webp)

# Features
- Single rendered panorama of an axolotls scene for your main menu

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
